summary: Match the 67 unmatched JIVO SKUs to ECOM scraper product canonicals; adversarially verify; output confirmed + unconfirmed for owner review

matches.reason: Multiple A2 cow ghee 500ml(=500g) listings: 'A2 Cow Ghee 500ml', 'Jivo_A2_Ghee_500ml', shopsy variant, and Amazon 'Jivo A2 Ghee 500 ML' bilona-method; size matches.
'Jivo Basil Seeds 200gm' plus 'Jivo Raw Basil Seeds for weight loss - 200gm (Jar Pack)' platform variants; exact 200g size.
'Jivo Basil Seeds 800gm' and 'Jivo Raw Basil Seeds ... 800g'; exact 800g size.

No canola oil at 100ml; only spices/coffee at 100ml (black pepper, cardamom, cumin, koffie).

Canola 5L+Canola 1L bundle: internal 'Canola 5+1L', 'Canola 5+1L_Shopsy', 'Jivo_Canola_Oil_5+1L', and Amazon 'Canola Cold Pressed Edible Oil 5 Litres with 1 Litre (5+1 LTR)' variants.
Canola 5+2L bundle: 'Canola 5+2L-shopsy (5+2 LTR)' and Amazon 'Jivo Canola Refined Edible Oils 5+2 Ltr (5 + 2 LTR)'.

200g chia seeds matches 'Jivo Chia Seeds 200gm (200 GMS)' and 'Jivo Premium Raw Chia seeds ... 200g (200 GMS)'; the 250grm and size-'na' listings excluded for size precision.
Pure chia seeds at 800g: 'Chiaseed800jar (800 GMS)' and 'Jivo Premium Raw Chia seeds ... 800g (800 GMS)'; excluded mixed-seed 'Flax_Sunflower_Pumpking_Chia_800G'.
'Cinnamon Sticks 100g (100 GMS)' and 'Jivo Organic Cinnamon Sticks Bark ... 100g (100 GMS)' match size exactly.
Only cola-flavoured juice in list: 'JIVO Healthy Wheatgrass ... Juice (Cola, 250 ml (Pack of 6))'; flavour matches but Jivo SKU gives no size to confirm.
No cottonseed/cotton-seed edible oil in candidates; only 'cotton' hits are apparel (dhoti-kurta, sports bra).
Exact 1+1L canola bundle: 'Canola 1+1L (1+1 LTR)', 'New_Canola 1+1L-Local', 'Canola 1+1L_Shopsy', 'Canola 1+1L-shopsy' and 'JIVO Canola Cold Pressed Edible Oil 1+1 Litres (1+1 LTR)'.

Desi ghee 1kg (list treats 1Kg=1 LTR): 'deshiGhee 1KG', 'Jivo Desi Ghee 1Kg(900G)', 'Jivo Desi Ghee 1 Litre'; 'Shopshy_Ghee_1Kg' is the generic (non-A2) shopsy 1kg; A2 Cow Ghee excluded as a different line.

'500KG' is not a real pack size; almost certainly a typo for 500G, so tentatively the single 500g desi ghee listings ('Desi Ghee 500G'); flagged low due to the size typo.

'Pomace olive oil 1+1+1L (1+1+1 LTR)' + Shopsy variant + Amazon 'Jivo Pomace ... Pack of 3 PET Bottles (1+1+1 LTR)'; excluded Sano-brand 'sano POMACE 1l+1l+1L'.
Pomace olive oil two-1L bundles, e.g. 'Pomace olive oil 1+1L (1+1 LTR)' and 'Jivo Pomace Olive Oil, 1L (Pack of 2) (1+1 LTR)' / 'Jivo Pomace Olive Oil Combo (1 L X 2)'.
Exact match to 'JIVO Jump Energy Drink, Zero Sugar 200ml (200 MLS)'.

No plain lemon juice in candidates; only lemon fizzy soda/water 750ml and wheatgrass-based Punjabi nimbu shikanji exist, neither is a lemon juice.

Plain/kachi-ghani mustard oil two-1L bundles, e.g. 'Mustard Oil 2L (1+1 LTR)' and 'JIVO Kachi Ghani Mustard Daily Cooking Oil 1 Litre (Pack of 2) (1LTR + 1LTR)'; excludes yellow-mustard and mixed-oil bundles.
No pure mustard 15L; only 15L items are 3-oil mixes ('canola-mustard-sunflower-15L'), not a pure-mustard same-bundle listing.
No orange product of any kind in the candidate list (wheatgrass juices come only in apple/blueberry/mango/mojito/rose/ginger-ale/cola).

'Jivo Rosemary Leaves Whole (150g) (150 GMS)' is exact same product and size.

'Sano_honey_500g (500 GMS)', 'Sano_honey_500g-Local (500 GMS)' and 'Sano Pure Honey 500g (500 GMS)' all match Sano honey at 500g.

Same physical bundle as SANO POMACE 1+1L: 'SANO Pomace Olive Oil 1L Pet Bottle (Pack of 2) (1LTR +1LTR)' exact; the two 'Sano Pomace Olive Oil 2L Pet Bottle (1+1 LTR)' tagged-1+1 listings are medium.
Exact brand+product+bundle match: 'sano POMACE 1l+1l+1L (1+1+1 LTR)' = Sano pomace olive oil 1+1+1L bundle.
Exact bundle match: 'Jivo First Pressed Sesame Oil ... (Pack of 2) (1LTR + 1LTR (BUNDLE))' = sesame 1L+1L; the other sesame listings are single 1L bottles.
'Fizzy Water Flavoured With Peach (750 ml)' = peach soda 750ml; 'Jivo DIet Fizzy Peach ... 750ml' is the same peach-soda product/size.

"Mojito Healthy Wheatgrass Juice (200 ml)" and JIVO Mojito-flavor 200ml (regular, not sugar-free); dajh7vuw7j7dzn7q = Wheatgrass_Mojito_6PCS (200 MLS) is the same 200ml mojito sold as a 6-pack.
"Mojito Healthy Wheatgrass Juice - Sugar Free (200 ml)" and JIVO sugar-free 200ml (Mojito Sugar Free) match the SF mojito 200ml.
"Rose Healthy Wheatgrass Juice (200 ml)" and JIVO Rose-flavor wheatgrass juice 200ml match exactly.

verdicts.note: JIVO SKU "COLA JUICE" is a cola-flavored juice. The proposed canonical is a Jivo wheatgrass body-detoxifying/immunity-booster juice (250ml). Brand matches (Jivo) and both are juices, but the product/flavor type is entirely different (cola vs wheatgrass). Not the same product — rejected. No cola-juice candidate exists among the wheatgrass/seed/oil candidates reviewed.

All three are Jivo Desi Ghee in the 500-size single jar. ghegwgyyfw9edubs is titled "Desi Ghee 500G" but normalized "(500 MLS)"; the long slug is titled "500 ML" but normalized "(500 GMS)" — the dataset itself treats 500g and 500ml as the same physical desi-ghee jar, so g-vs-ml labeling is not a real quantity mismatch (a strict g≠ml read would even reject candidate 1, whose own normalized size is 500 MLS — clearly unintended). No competing different-quantity 500 variant exists among the candidates, so confirming all three is safe. Brand (Jivo) and product (Desi Ghee) match exactly for all. Source: /tmp/claude-0/-root/4fceceb7-1c85-47c9-a853-be060cf86a86/scratchpad/match/ecom_candidates.tsv lines 214, 477, 478. (Other nearby ghee SKUs deliberately NOT matched: deshiGhee 1KG / Jivo Desi Ghee 1Kg / Desi ghee 500g pack of 2 are all 1KG/1L = wrong size; A2 Cow Ghee variants are a different product line.)

Confirmed: jivo-wheatgrass-punjabi-jeera-juice-160ml (display "Jivo Wheatgrass Punjabi Jeera Juice - 160ml | Tangy Cumin Flavored...") is a direct match for JIVO SKU "JEERA JUICE" — Jivo brand, product literally "Jeera Juice", 160ml. Rejected: ardhcjmtxhz5hqda ("Punjabi_Masala_Jeera_160ml_Pack_Of_24") — named "Masala Jeera" (spiced variant), NOT "Jeera Juice"; the word "Juice" is absent and "Masala" added, indicating a distinct product. JIVO SKU specifies no pack size, so the product name is the discriminator (both ECOM listings are 160ml Pack-of-24 cases). Default-reject applied to the masala-named candidate. Candidates source: /tmp/claude-0/-root/4fceceb7-1c85-47c9-a853-be060cf86a86/scratchpad/match/ecom_candidates.tsv (lines 875 and 4).

JIVO SKU is a Sano-brand pomace olive oil 1+1L BUNDLE (two 1L bottles, total 2L). Authoritative pack field in this dataset is the parenthetical "(... LTR)" tag. CONFIRMED: (1) ...cuisine-2l (line 954), display "SANO Pomace Olive Oil 1L Pet Bottle ... (1L) (Pack of 2) (1LTR +1LTR)" = unambiguous exact 1+1L bundle. (2) ...cuis-2l (line 956), display "Sano Pomace Olive Oil 2L Pet Bottle ... (1+1 LTR)" — pack tag exactly equals 1+1L; the "2L" in the title is the bundle's total volume, and it is NOT tagged "(2 LTR)" as a single 2L bottle would be (medium confidence due to "2L Pet Bottle" title noise). REJECTED: ...cuis-1l (line 955), display "Sano Pomace Olive Oil 2l Pet Bottle ... 1l" — tag "1l" (single 1L), title says "2l Pet Bottle"; contradictory and not a 1+1L bundle in any reading. Note: the dataset also contains a cleaner short Sano bundle "pomace 1l+1l (1+1 LTR)" / "sano POMACE 1l+1l+1L (1+1+1 LTR)" but those were not among the proposed canonicals.

JIVO "SANO POMACE 1L+1L" = Sano-brand pomace olive oil, multi-bottle BUNDLE of two separate 1L bottles. All three candidates are Sano Pomace (brand+oil-type match); pack format is the discriminator. CONFIRMED: line 954 display name "SANO Pomace Olive Oil 1L Pet Bottle ... (1L) (Pack of 2) (1LTR +1LTR)" — exact 1L+1L two-bottle bundle. REJECTED: line 956 "Sano Pomace Olive Oil 2L Pet Bottle ... (1+1 LTR)" — title is a SINGLE 2L PET bottle; its "(1+1 LTR)" annotation contradicts the title, and the clean 1L+1L bundle already exists (candidate 1), so defaulted to reject on the conflict. REJECTED: line 955 "Sano Pomace Olive Oil 2l Pet Bottle ... 1l" — single 2L bottle with a 1L annotation; neither a 1L+1L bundle nor a size match. Source: /tmp/claude-0/-root/4fceceb7-1c85-47c9-a853-be060cf86a86/scratchpad/match/ecom_candidates.tsv (lines 954, 955, 956).

JIVO "WG GINGER ALE 200ML" = Jivo Wheatgrass Ginger Ale juice, single 200ml. CONFIRMED: (1) ginger-ale-healthy-wheatgrass-juice-sugar-free-200ml = "Ginger Ale Healthy Wheatgrass Juice Sugar Free 200ml" — exact brand/flavor/size, single 200ml. (3) jivo-healthy-wheatgrass-body-detoxifying-immunity-booster-juice-sugar-free-200-ml-200ml — slug hides flavor but display name is "JIVO Healthy Wheatgrass...Juice Sugar Free, 200 ml (Ginger Ale Sugar Free)", single 200ml; confirmed via display name. Note its sibling slug ...sugar-free-200ml-200ml (line 672) is the MOJITO variant, NOT a match. REJECTED: dajh7tq57qbrq7dt = "Wheatgrass_Ginger_Ale_Sugar_Free_6PCS (200 MLS)" — correct brand/flavor but a 6-piece multipack bundle, not a single 200ml unit, so pack size does not match exactly. All ginger-ale wheatgrass listings are sugar-free (no non-SF ginger ale exists in the set), so the SKU's omission of "SF" is not a mismatch. Candidates file: /tmp/claude-0/-root/4fceceb7-1c85-47c9-a853-be060cf86a86/scratchpad/match/ecom_candidates.tsv
